goal: Three simultaneous failures have been reported after deployment v7.8.2 rolled out 40 minutes ago. Model accuracy dropped 22%, P99 latency spiked to 1200ms, and 15% of users are receiving inconsistent recommendations. Identify ALL root causes and propose a coordinated remediation plan.
alert_summary: CRITICAL CASCADE: Multiple simultaneous failures detected post-deployment v7.8.2. Embedding service errors, feature store anomalies, and traffic routing inconsistencies all triggered within 5 minutes of each other.
root_cause: cascade: embedding_service_v3 ONNX mismatch + feature_store cache TTL=0 + ab_test_router traffic split corruption

api_gateway.description: Routes traffic to model serving layer. No config changes in v7.8.2.

logs.msg: Upstream response latency increasing — 3 services affected.

embedding_service_v3.description: Generates dense embeddings for user/item features. Upgraded to ONNX Runtime 1.17 in v7.8.2.

logs.msg: ONNXRuntimeException: op 'MatMul' version mismatch — model exported with opset 17, runtime supports opset 15.
Embedding generation failed for 847 requests. Returning zero-vector fallback.
Zero-vector embeddings propagating to feature_store cache. Downstream models receiving corrupted inputs.
Model accuracy monitoring flagging rapid degradation — 0.83→0.71 in 90 seconds.

feature_store.description: Caches preprocessed features for real-time serving. Config change in v7.8.2: cache_ttl changed 300s → 0s.

logs.msg: cache_ttl set to 0s — all cache entries immediately expired. Cache miss rate: 100%.
Serving stale features from fallback store (last updated: 14:19 UTC). All downstream models affected.
Feature freshness SLA breached. Stale features being served to 100% of requests.

ab_test_router.description: Routes traffic between Model A (production) and Model B (canary). Traffic split config corrupted in v7.8.2.

logs.msg: Traffic split config invalid: model_a=0%, model_b=100%. Expected: model_a=90%, model_b=10%.
100% of traffic now routed to model_b. model_b has not completed stress testing.
model_b serving degraded quality — not trained on post-Q3 data. User complaint rate spiking.

model_server.description: Serves model inference. Degraded due to corrupted inputs from upstream (embedding_service + feature_store).

logs.msg: Receiving zero-vector embeddings from embedding_service. Prediction quality degraded.
Feature freshness violations detected. Stale features in 100% of requests.

monitoring_service.description: Aggregates metrics and fires alerts. No changes in v7.8.2.

logs.msg: Model accuracy dropped below SLA threshold 0.75. Current: 0.61.

config_diff.author: deploy-bot
config_diff.pr_title: v7.8.2: Upgrade ONNX runtime + cache optimization + AB router refactor
config_diff.note: Three config parameters changed simultaneously in this deployment.
